5.0.short_description: This keyword specifies that the clump position, volume, and inertia tensor will be calculated from the pebble distribution assuming constant density. The space containing the clump is recursively subdivided into boxes that are {squares in 2D; cubes in 3D}. The {areas in 2D; volumes in 3D} and inertia tensors of all boxes that fall completely within any pebbles are accumulated. The parallel axis theorem is used to accumulate the inertia tensors. For each iteration the "final" volume is extrapolated, and the iterations cease when either 1) the total number of cells to be subdivided reaches 1e6 or 2) the extrapolated and estimated volumes are within the desired tolerance

keywords.name: clump.create.group

keywords.name: clump.create.inertia
keywords.description: Set the inertia "tensor" of the clump in its current configuration

keywords.name: clump.create.pebbles

keywords.name: clump.create.position
keywords.description: Clump position that is the origin by default

keywords.name: clump.create.volume
keywords.description: Set the {volume per unit thickness in 2D; volume in 3D} to <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: clump.create.x
keywords.description: The x -component of the clump centroid position that is 0 by default

keywords.name: clump.create.y
keywords.description: The y -component of the clump centroid position that is 0 by default

keywords.name: clump.create.z
keywords.description: The z -component of the clump centroid position that is 0 by default
